description_long: This is a single, high-ankle hiking boot with a rugged, weathered appearance, primarily constructed from dark synthetic fabric and rubber. The boot features a padded collar and tongue for ankle support, with visible red and gray accents along the seams and sole. The lacing system consists of metal eyelets and hooks, with brown laces threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern. The brand name 'SALEWA' is prominently displayed on the tongue and outer side, accompanied by a stylized logo. The sole is thick and robust, designed for traction, and shows signs of dirt and wear, indicating extensive outdoor use. The overall condition suggests the boot has been well-used, with visible creases, scuffs, and some discoloration.
description: A rugged, high-ankle hiking boot with dark synthetic fabric, red accents, and visible SALEWA branding, showing significant wear and outdoor use.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the padded collar, heel structure, and worn midsole with visible dirt and scuff marks.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the layered construction, metal eyelets, and the curvature of the sole with pronounced wear.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the SALEWA logo on the tongue, the criss-cross lacing, and the rounded, scuffed toe area.
description_view_3: Side-front view emphasizing the SALEWA branding on the outer side, the lacing system, and the rugged, dirt-stained sole.
attribute_logo: White stylized bird logo on the tongue and outer side
